title: Wingdings Enchants
description: Replaces the Standard Galactic Alphabet (Enchanting Language) with Wingdings.
body:
**"Wingdings is a series of dingbat fonts that render letters as a variety of symbols. They were originally developed in 1990 by Microsoft by combining glyphs from Lucida Icons, Arrows, and Stars licensed from Charles Bigelow and Kris Holmes."**  
~ Wikipedia.org

**Wingdings Enchants** is a resourcepack that replaces the "Standard Galactic Alphabet", seen in Minecraft in enchanting tables, to the mysterious font "Wingdings", seen in works such as "UNDERTALE" and... "Saturday Night Live".

The font was redrawn entirely by me, to fit in with the pixelart-y style of Minecraft.

**Note:** The font in the resourcepack uses lowercase Wingdings characters for both upper and lowercase, as it is impossible to see uppercase SGA in Minecraft by normal means, and because SGA doesen't even have upper or lowercase letters.
